Module kivakit.microservice
Package com.telenav.kivakit.microservice.protocols.rest

Class MicroservletRestPath

java.lang.Object
com.telenav.kivakit.microservice.protocols.rest.MicroservletRestPath
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.telenav.kivakit.core.registry.RegistryTrait, Comparable<MicroservletRestPath>
public class MicroservletRestPath extends Object implements com.telenav.kivakit.core.registry.RegistryTrait, Comparable<MicroservletRestPath>
A request path and method for a Microservlet.

jonathanl (shibo)
